web.title: The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami | Brickell Key
web.description: Rising above the coastline from Brickell Key, The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami offer over 200 private residences for elevated Miami living.

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/themes/mandarin/img/bottom-fade.png)

An Elevated Expression of Island Living

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/themes/mandarin/img/down2.svg)![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/themes/mandarin/img/down.svg)

**Distinctive at Every Level**

Rising above the Miami coastline from Brickell Key,

The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami, offers an elevated expression of island living. Developed by Swire Properties, these illustrious homes bring distinct touches of glamour, stunning panoramic views, and a cosmopolitan resort lifestyle together with Mandarin Oriental’s legendary service.

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/RMOMIA_HERO.jpg)

The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/The-Residences-at-Mandarin-Oriental-Miami_SOUTH-TOWER-LOBBY-scaled.jpg)

Penthouse, South Tower Residences

**Exceptional at**

**Every Level**

Warm but modern, innovative yet nourishing, The Residences live up to the highest expectations. Each two- to five-bedroom home features floor-to-ceiling windows and generous balconies to bring the outdoors in. World-renowned design infuses thoughtful touches and state-of-the-art materials, fixtures and appliances create refined residences that you’ll be delighted to call home.

[DISCOVER THE RESIDENCES](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/residences/)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/INT26_Terrace-Pool_B4.jpg)

The Knightsbridge Penthouse

**Timeless Elegance**

Rooted in the belief that a home should exist in harmony with its surroundings, this penthouse draws inspiration from the ocean, with soft undulating forms and organic textures. Envisioned by Harrods Interior Design, the space aims to seamlessly integrate biomorphic elements to evoke a sense of tranquility and graceful movement while its palette is designed to mimic the fleeting shadows and light reminiscent of the ever-changing depths of the ocean.

[DISCOVER THE KNIGHTSBRIDGE PENTHOUSE](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/the-knightsbridge-penthouse/)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/INT26_Terrace-Pool_B4.jpg)

The Knightsbridge Penthouse

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img2.jpg)

KPF

**Unparalleled Design**

Designed by the esteemed KPF, with interiors by Tristan Auer and Laura Gonzalez, and landscape architecture by Shma, The Residences is truly a global vision come to life. With over 326 homes infused with grandeur down to the finest details, coupled with an immersive resort lifestyle, living here offers the best of both worlds.

[DISCOVER THE DESIGN](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/team/)

The Residences is a destination of refinement, with distinct touches of nature to nourish the senses. The signature Mandarin Oriental experience is reimagined through passionate service and acclaimed amenities, creating an enchanting oasis that is more than just a place to live.

[INQUIRE TODAY](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/inquire-about-the-residences-miami/)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/themes/mandarin/img/bg1.svg)![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/themes/mandarin/img/m-pattern.png)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/RMOMAI-_-LAGOON-POOL-1.jpg)

Lagoon Pool

**Experience the Exceptional**

Mandarin Oriental’s legendary service elevates the everyday, from gourmet dining prepared to your specifications to award-winning spa services tailored to your unique needs.

Resort-style living is reimagined with direct access to a 100,000-square-foot meticulously landscaped podium, thoughtfully designed with dedicated spaces to relax, dine and connect. The experiences offered at The Residences exceed every expectation, setting a new standard for the city and beyond.

[DISCOVER THE AMENITIES](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/amenities-and-services/)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/miami-detail-tea-set-4-scaled-1.jpg)

Mandarin Oriental

**Legendary Service.**

**Delightful Encounters.**

Mandarin Oriental is synonymous with legendary service. A dedicated team graciously anticipates your needs with subtle discretion, creating a special sense of home where every detail is meticulously curated. The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami truly offers the best of both worlds; the comforts of a private home combined with the unsurpassed amenities and legendary service of Mandarin Oriental.

[Discover the services](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/amenities-and-services/)

![](https://mo-residencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/miami-detail-tea-set-4-scaled-1.jpg)

Mandarin Oriental

The two duplex penthouses, each spanning approximately 8,000 square feet and set on floors 63 & 64, feature 360° ocean views, private lap pools and wellness zones, speakeasy bars, redefining the essence of coastal luxury. This milestone is especially notable given that these transactions took place prior to groundbreaking, an extraordinary signal of confidence from ultra-high-net-worth buyers. web.title: Mandarin Residences Brickell Key Miami | Pricing & Photos

# The Residences at Mandarin Oriental

### **Brickell / 2029**

66 Stories / 228 Residences of
2, 3, 4 & 5 Bedrooms

**500 Brickell Key Dr, Miami, FL 33131, USA**

[+1.305.647.2667](tel:13056472667)

Average Price: $2,500 x SF ($26,910 x M2)

The Residences at Mandarin Oriental Miami is planned on the famous Brickell Key with two super-tall towers, a new residential building called Mandarin Residences and a new Hotel tower, in one of the most exclusive sectors in all of Miami. Interior design at the residences will be by Parisian designer Tristan Auer; landscape design will be by Thai firm Shma.

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $6,600,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/mandarinresidences/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

Developed by Swire Properties

Website: [https://MandarinResidences.miami/](https://mandarinresidences.miami/)

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $6,600,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/mandarinresidences/#contactform) for more information.

**Payment Plan**

20% At Contract

10% at Groundbreaking

10% at Top Off

60% Delivery Q1 2029



## Features

### Building Features

- Lobby
- Valet parking
- Bike parking
- Cafe
- Coworking
- Package room
- Fitness center
- Pool
- Jacuzzi
- Barbecue area
- Wine & beer bar

### Residence Features

- Parking spaces
- Spacious floor plans
- 10 foot ceilings
- Sleek kitchen cabinets
- Stainless steel kitchen appliances

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/MandarinOrientalMiamiResidences.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Developer-Swire.jpg)

Swire Properties is a globally renowned development brand, comprising a diverse portfolio of sub-brands and businesses. Using their team’s creative mindset and long-term approach to business, they seek out new perspectives to solve today’s challenges. Some of their most renowned Miami condos include [Reach](https://miamiresidential.com/ReachBCC) and [Rise](https://miamiresidential.com/risebrickellcitycentre) at Brickell City Centre, [Asia,](https://miamiresidential.com/asia-brickell-key/)[Carbonell](https://miamiresidential.com/carbonell/), [One](https://miamiresidential.com/onetequestapoint/), [Two](https://miamiresidential.com/two-tequesta-point/) and [Three Tequesta Point](https://miamiresidential.com/three-tequesta-point/), and more.

## Latest News

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Mandarin-MR.jpg)

### The Mandarin Penthouses Have Sold!

A new record has been set in Miami with the sale of the two penthouses at Mandarin Residences Brickell Key for $50 million each—spectacular news for one of our city's finest developments.

Updated on: 03/21/2026
